package_name: Salazar Roofing OS - DevOps Demo Build Package

app.product_positioning: Roofing/remodeling CRM + insurance-support system + crew operations app + customer portal + StormLoop growth engine.
app.north_star: One connected flow from storm event to lead, inspection, claim-support file, job production, customer update, payment, warranty, review, referral, and repeat revenue.
app.demo_tagline: Normal CRMs manage jobs after you get them. This system helps find storm opportunities, win the job, run the job, update the customer, collect the money, and turn the customer into future referrals.
app.mvp_release_goal: Clickable working demo showing owner dashboard, job detail, ClaimDesk, CrewDesk, customer portal, StormLoop, and referrals using seeded data.

uploaded_source_materials_reviewed.purpose: Working HTML prototype/demo: dashboard, jobs board, job detail, insurance tab, crew view, notification history, customer list, and reports.
Crew manager role model and permission matrix artifact.
Operational needs breakdown, roofing/remodeling software landscape, feature gap analysis, insurance workflow, and customer notification strategy.
Original interactive database schema artifact: core CRM, insurance, operations, crew, communications, billing, relationships, and tech stack.

research_sources.title: Texas Department of Insurance - Roofing and insurance: Know the law
research_sources.used_for: Texas insurance-claim language, public adjuster prohibition, deductible-waiver guardrails.

research_sources.title: National Weather Service - Alerts API documentation
research_sources.used_for: Storm alert integration design and polling guidance.

research_sources.title: National Weather Service - Severe Thunderstorm Warning damage threat categories
research_sources.used_for: StormLoop severity thresholds: 1.00 in hail/58 mph wind; 1.75 in/70 mph; 2.75 in/80 mph.

research_sources.title: NOAA NCEI - Storm Events Database
research_sources.used_for: Historical storm event verification and later reporting.

research_sources.title: Twilio - A2P 10DLC campaign approval best practices
research_sources.used_for: SMS consent, opt-in, opt-out, HELP/STOP, campaign registration requirements.

research_sources.title: Twilio - How to collect customer consent in A2P 10DLC campaigns
research_sources.used_for: Consent capture design for transactional vs marketing messages.

research_sources.title: Federal Trade Commission - Consumer Reviews and Testimonials Rule Q&A
research_sources.used_for: Referral/review incentive rules and anti-fake-review guardrails.

research_sources.title: AccuLynx - Roofing customer portal software
research_sources.used_for: Customer portal feature validation: status, appointments, documents, billing, payments, messages.

research_sources.title: AccuLynx - Plan options
research_sources.used_for: Market baseline for roofing CRM pricing and core features.

research_sources.title: JobNimbus - Pricing and packages
research_sources.used_for: Competitor packaging, user tiers, boards, automations, mobile app, integrations.

research_sources.title: QuickBooks - Job and project costing software
Texas Attorney General - Door-to-door sales and 3-day right of rescission
Data.gov/Census - ZCTA boundaries are approximate ZIP representations
research_sources.used_for: ZIP/ZCTA caveat for StormLoop affected-area mapping.

roles.label: Owner / Admin
roles.description: Full company control. Owns settings, users, roles, billing, all jobs, claims, reports, and compliance templates.

roles.label: Office Manager
roles.description: Runs daily admin, documents, customer communications, scheduling, materials approval, invoices, and portal updates.
roles.data_scope: All active company records except restricted admin settings.

roles.label: Production Manager
roles.description: Owns job schedules, crews, materials, production boards, field issues, punch lists, and warranty closeout.
roles.data_scope: Production-related records and job details. Limited financial summary only.

roles.label: Insurance Coordinator
roles.description: Organizes claim-support paperwork, adjuster appointments, carrier scopes, estimate versions, supplements, and ACV/RCV tracking.
roles.data_scope: Claims and related jobs/documents only. No payroll or crew performance access.

roles.label: Sales Rep / Estimator
roles.description: Works assigned leads, inspections, estimates, proposals, signatures, and follow-ups.
roles.data_scope: Assigned leads, customers, inspections, jobs, and basic claim summary for assigned jobs.

roles.label: Crew Manager
roles.description: Field supervisor. Can manage assigned crews and assigned jobs in the field but cannot see insurance/financial details.
roles.data_scope: Jobs explicitly granted through crew_manager_job_access and crews assigned through crew_manager_assignments.

roles.label: Crew Lead
roles.description: On-site leader for a single assignment/day. Handles safety checklist, photos, progress notes, and issue reporting.

roles.label: Crew Member
roles.description: Field worker with minimal access: today schedule, scope, safety acknowledgement, and photo upload if enabled.

roles.label: Marketing Manager
roles.description: Owns StormLoop, canvassing missions, referral campaigns, customer check-ins, and lead-source reporting.
roles.data_scope: StormLoop records, referrals, leads from marketing, and opted-in customer lists.

roles.label: Canvasser / Field Marketer
roles.description: Works assigned canvassing route, logs door outcomes, captures consent, and creates inspection leads.
roles.data_scope: Assigned route and leads they create. No job financials or claim information.

roles.label: Accountant
roles.description: Handles invoices, payments, QuickBooks sync, job costing, and financial reporting.
roles.data_scope: Finance records and job financial summaries. No crew performance reviews unless explicitly granted.

roles.label: Customer / Homeowner
roles.description: Portal user. Sees only their own job status, documents shared to portal, invoices, warranty, messages, and referral wallet.
roles.data_scope: Single job/property accessed through valid portal token or customer login.

modules.name: CRM Command Center
modules.objective: Capture, qualify, assign, and convert leads into inspections and jobs.
acceptance_criteria: Create lead in under 60 seconds from desktop or mobile.
Assign lead to rep and schedule inspection.
Convert lead to job while preserving source, storm event, and referral attribution.

modules.name: Inspection App
modules.objective: Give reps a mobile-first inspection workflow with structured checklists, tagged photos, and inspection reports.
acceptance_criteria: Inspection can be completed from a phone.
Photos attach to the correct job/property and support tags.
Inspection completion triggers customer update and office task.

modules.name: ClaimDesk Insurance-Support Module
modules.objective: Track claim-related paperwork and payment milestones while keeping contractor language compliant.
acceptance_criteria: User can view all claim details for a job in one tab.
ACV, RCV, deductible, supplement, and final balance are tracked as separate records.
Risky phrases like claim negotiation and deductible waiver are blocked in templates.

modules.name: Production Board
modules.objective: Move contracted roofing/remodeling jobs through materials, scheduling, crew assignment, QC, invoice, and warranty.
acceptance_criteria: Job status changes are logged.
Production manager can see jobs stuck by stage.
Status changes can trigger customer notifications.

modules.name: CrewDesk Operations
modules.objective: Give crew managers controlled field authority for assigned crews and jobs without exposing financial/claim data.
acceptance_criteria: Crew manager sees only assigned jobs and crews.
Daily job log can trigger a customer progress notification if approved.
Safety checklist must pass before job is moved to in_progress.

modules.name: Customer Portal
modules.objective: Reduce check-in calls by giving homeowners a secure magic-link portal for job status, next steps, docs, invoices, warranty, and referrals.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can open portal without app download.
Portal view is limited to one job/token.
Portal views are audited with timestamp and IP/device metadata.

modules.name: Notification Engine
modules.objective: Centralize SMS/email/portal updates with consent tracking, approved templates, delivery logs, and automation triggers.
acceptance_criteria: No marketing SMS sends without marketing consent.
Transactional messages include brand and opt-out language where needed.
Each outbound/inbound message is logged.

modules.name: StormLoop Growth Engine
modules.objective: Turn severe weather into organized, ethical, measurable sales activity: affected ZIPs, missions, routes, door knocks, leads, referrals, and revenue attribution.
acceptance_criteria: Simulated or live weather event creates affected ZIP records.
Marketing manager can launch a mission and assign routes.
Canvasser can create a lead from a door knock with consent status and storm attribution.

modules.name: Referral Rewards Engine
modules.objective: Track referrals from customer share link to job completion and reward approval, creating long-term customer loyalty.
acceptance_criteria: Referral source follows lead through job and payment.
Reward remains pending until job is complete and paid.
Review incentives cannot require positive sentiment.

modules.name: Finance, Job Costing, and Reports
modules.objective: Track invoices, claim payments, job costs, QuickBooks sync, revenue by source, and operational KPIs.
acceptance_criteria: Revenue can be reported by job type, storm event, ZIP, rep, and referral source.
QuickBooks integration can be mocked in demo and enabled later.

modules.name: Remodeling Expansion
modules.objective: Support longer remodel jobs with selections, allowances, permits, change orders, subs, daily logs, client approvals, and punch lists.
acceptance_criteria: Remodeling jobs use a separate pipeline from roofing.
Change orders require approval and preserve audit history.

workflows.name: Storm-to-Sale Growth Flow
steps: Door knock creates lead with consent and attribution
Job revenue tied back to storm event, ZIP, route, rep, and referral source
success_metrics: Time from storm alert to mission launch

workflows.name: Homeowner-Owned Insurance-Support Flow
steps: Homeowner files claim and provides claim number
ClaimDesk stores carrier, claim number, date of loss, adjuster
Carrier scope and contractor estimate uploaded

workflows.name: Crew Daily Progress Flow
steps: Production manager assigns crew to job schedule
If notify_customer=true, customer receives progress update
Office sees progress and issues on dashboard

workflows.name: Customer Portal Flow
steps: Customer sees status, next step, timeline, shared photos/docs, invoice/warranty
Customer messages office or pays invoice
After job complete, review request and referral link are shown

workflows.name: Referral Reward Flow
steps: Referral status follows lead and job
Reward remains pending until job complete and paid
Referral revenue attribution appears in reports

desktop.purpose: KPI cards, stuck claims, storm alerts, crews, revenue, referrals.
Kanban board by job status and job type.
Overview, insurance, crew/schedule, photos, notifications, documents.
Claim list, adjuster info, payment tracker, supplement status.
Crews, schedules, safety, daily logs, cert alerts, material requests.
Active storm events, ZIP impacts, missions, affected customers, attribution.
Create canvassing/check-in missions, assign routes and goals.
Referral pipeline, rewards, loyalty tiers, top referrers.
Review customer-facing portal before sending link.
SMS consent, approved scripts, do-not-knock, deductible/claim language rules.

mobile_staff.purpose: Create lead from phone; supports storm/referral source.
Canvasser route, door script, storm summary, property pins.
Log knock, outcome, consent, appointment, referral source.
Crew scope, safety checklist, daily log, material request.

customer_portal.purpose: Contract, estimate, invoice, warranty, claim-support docs shared by staff.
Referral link, QR, reward status, loyalty tier.

database_schema.security_model: tenant_id/company_id + role-based access + row-level security policies

entities.name: companies
entities.purpose: Tenant/company record for single or multi-company support.
entities.rls_scope: Tenant root. Users may only access their company_id records.

entities.name: users
entities.purpose: Internal staff, crew, canvassers, and external limited-access users.
entities.rls_scope: Admin sees company users; users see own profile; managers see users they supervise.

entities.name: role_permissions
entities.purpose: Permission matrix for module/action/data-scope control.
entities.rls_scope: Only admin can edit.

entities.name: customers
entities.purpose: Homeowners/customers and referrers.
entities.rls_scope: Staff by role/scope; customer only via portal token or authenticated own record.

entities.name: properties
entities.purpose: Physical service locations; one customer can have multiple properties.
entities.rls_scope: Inherited from customer/job access.

entities.name: leads
entities.purpose: Pre-job opportunities from web, phone, door knock, storm, referral, repeat customer, or yard sign.
entities.rls_scope: Sales reps see assigned leads; marketing sees marketing/canvassing leads; office/admin see all.

entities.name: jobs
entities.purpose: Central hub. Every claim, schedule, photo, invoice, notification, crew log, and warranty keys back to jobs.
entities.rls_scope: Role-based. Crew access only through schedules/crew_manager_job_access; customer via portal token.

entities.name: appointments
entities.purpose: Inspections, adjuster meetings, customer meetings, deliveries, final walkthroughs.
entities.rls_scope: Assigned staff and office/admin.

entities.name: inspections
entities.purpose: Structured inspection record for roofing/remodeling inspections.
entities.rls_scope: Assigned sales/office/admin.

entities.name: inspection_checklist_items
entities.purpose: Checklist answers for each inspection.
entities.rls_scope: Inherited from inspection.

entities.name: photos
entities.purpose: Tagged job/property photos: before, during, after, damage, cleanup, warranty proof.
entities.rls_scope: Crew can upload on assigned jobs; portal sees only shared_to_portal.

entities.name: documents
entities.purpose: Estimates, contracts, insurance scopes, PDFs, warranties, invoices, permits, reports.
entities.rls_scope: Portal sees only shared docs; role-based internal access.

entities.name: insurance_claims
entities.purpose: Claim-support record for insurance-related jobs.
entities.rls_scope: Admin/office/insurance coordinator. Sales assigned limited. Crew no access. Portal limited summary only.

entities.name: claim_contacts
entities.purpose: Adjusters, desk adjusters, claim reps, mortgage contacts, supplement partners.
entities.rls_scope: Inherited from claim.

entities.name: estimate_versions
entities.purpose: Contractor estimates, carrier scopes, Xactimate PDFs, proposal versions.
entities.rls_scope: Role-based; crew no access.

entities.name: supplements
entities.purpose: Supplement request tracker and outcome history.
entities.rls_scope: Admin/office/insurance coordinator.

entities.name: claim_payments
entities.purpose: Separate check/payment milestones for ACV, deductible, RCV, supplement, upgrade, and final balance.
entities.rls_scope: Admin/office/accountant/insurance coordinator. Crew no access. Portal own invoice only.

entities.name: crews
entities.purpose: Crew groups for roofing/remodeling production.
entities.rls_scope: Production/admin all; crew managers assigned crews.

entities.name: crew_members
entities.purpose: Users assigned to crews plus worker metadata.
entities.rls_scope: Production/admin; crew manager sees assigned crew. Hourly_rate hidden from crew manager unless granted.

entities.name: crew_manager_assignments
entities.purpose: Map crew managers to one or more crews; supports primary/backup managers.
entities.rls_scope: Admin/production edit; manager can view own assignments.

entities.name: crew_manager_job_access
entities.purpose: Explicit grants that control which jobs a crew manager can access and at what level.
entities.rls_scope: This table drives crew manager RLS.

entities.name: job_schedules
entities.purpose: Crew/day assignments for jobs.
entities.rls_scope: Production/admin all; assigned crew/manager limited.

entities.name: daily_job_logs
entities.purpose: End-of-day or progress logs submitted by crew manager/lead.
entities.rls_scope: Assigned crew manager/lead create; office/admin/prod view.

entities.name: safety_checklists
entities.purpose: Daily pre-work signoff; can gate job start.
entities.rls_scope: Assigned crew create/view; production/admin view.

entities.name: material_orders
entities.purpose: Material requests and order tracking.
entities.rls_scope: Crew manager request; office/production approve.

entities.name: material_order_items
entities.purpose: Line items for material orders/requests.
entities.rls_scope: Inherited from material_order. Unit cost hidden for crew unless granted.

entities.name: crew_certifications
entities.purpose: OSHA, fall protection, manufacturer certifications, expiration alerts.
entities.rls_scope: Production/admin; crew manager sees assigned crew cert status.

entities.name: crew_performance_reviews
entities.purpose: Optional job-level or periodic worker scorecards.
entities.rls_scope: Admin/production. Crew manager can review own crew, but not company-wide reports.

entities.name: portal_tokens
entities.purpose: Secure magic-link access for customer portal without app download.
entities.rls_scope: Public portal only via token validation; internal staff by role.

entities.name: notification_templates
entities.purpose: Approved SMS/email/portal templates with variables.
entities.rls_scope: Admin/office edit. Others send only approved active templates.

entities.name: notifications
entities.purpose: Outbound and inbound communication records.
entities.rls_scope: Staff role-based; portal own job messages.

entities.name: sms_consents
entities.purpose: Consent evidence for transactional and marketing SMS.
entities.rls_scope: Admin/office/marketing. Auditable.

entities.name: approved_scripts
entities.purpose: Approved canvassing scripts, insurance disclaimers, deductible warnings, SMS snippets, review/referral language.
entities.rls_scope: Admin/office edit; staff can use active only.

entities.name: invoices
entities.purpose: Customer invoices and payment status.
entities.rls_scope: Accounting/office/admin; portal own invoice.

entities.name: payments
entities.purpose: Non-claim payment transactions, payment links, card/ACH/check status.
entities.rls_scope: Accounting/office/admin; portal own payments.

entities.name: job_costs
entities.purpose: Cost tracking for labor, materials, subcontractors, permits, overhead, and gross margin.
entities.rls_scope: Accounting/admin. Production sees limited budget vs actual if granted.

entities.name: service_areas
entities.purpose: Configured cities, ZIPs/ZCTAs, counties, and radius markets monitored for weather events.
entities.rls_scope: Marketing/admin edit; staff view.

entities.name: storm_events
entities.purpose: Detected or simulated hail/wind/tornado/severe storm events.
entities.rls_scope: Marketing/admin all; sales view.

entities.name: storm_zip_impacts
entities.purpose: Impact ranking by affected marketing ZIP/ZCTA.
entities.rls_scope: Marketing/admin all; sales view.

entities.name: storm_customer_impacts
entities.purpose: Past/existing customers located in a storm impact area for check-in campaigns.
entities.rls_scope: Marketing/admin. Message send constrained by consent.

entities.name: marketing_missions
entities.purpose: Canvassing/customer-check-in missions launched from storm events.
entities.rls_scope: Marketing/admin edit; canvasser sees assigned routes only.

entities.name: canvassing_routes
entities.purpose: Territory/route assigned to a canvasser.
entities.rls_scope: Canvasser sees assigned routes; marketing/admin all.

entities.name: door_knocks
entities.purpose: Property-level canvassing interaction log and lead creation source.
entities.rls_scope: Canvasser own route; marketing/admin all.

entities.name: do_not_knock_addresses
entities.purpose: Addresses where canvassers should not knock or solicit.
entities.rls_scope: Marketing/admin edit; canvasser route app consumes read-only.

entities.name: referrals
entities.purpose: Tracks referred customers from link/QR/manual entry through lead, job, payment, reward.
entities.rls_scope: Marketing/admin all; referrer portal sees own referrals without private referred customer details.

entities.name: referral_rewards
entities.purpose: Reward approval and issue tracking.
entities.rls_scope: Admin/marketing/office; customer sees status only.

entities.name: customer_loyalty_accounts
entities.purpose: Lifetime referral wallet and VIP status for customers.
entities.rls_scope: Customer own account via portal; marketing/admin all.

entities.name: loyalty_ledger
entities.purpose: Points/reward ledger events.
entities.rls_scope: Inherited from loyalty account.

entities.name: remodeling_selections
entities.purpose: Selections and allowance tracking for remodeling jobs.
entities.rls_scope: Production/office/sales; portal sees own selections pending approval.

entities.name: change_orders
entities.purpose: Cost/schedule changes needing approval.
entities.rls_scope: Production/office; customer own approval via portal.

entities.name: permits
entities.purpose: Permit and inspection tracker.
entities.rls_scope: Production/office/admin; portal limited status.

entities.name: punch_list_items
entities.purpose: Final punch list and cleanup/QC tasks.
entities.rls_scope: Production/crew assigned/customer portal limited if shared.

entities.name: warranties
entities.purpose: Workmanship/manufacturer warranty records and portal docs.
entities.rls_scope: Office/production/admin; portal shared own.

entities.name: activity_logs
entities.purpose: Immutable timeline/audit log for important actions.
entities.rls_scope: Admin/office; role-specific audit views. Append-only.

api_spec.format: REST JSON for demo; can be converted to OpenAPI later

endpoints.description: Return current user, role, company, and permissions.
Owner KPI cards, stuck jobs, claims needing attention, crew status, storm alerts, and referral revenue.
List leads filtered by status, source, assigned rep, storm, referral.
Create lead; supports storm_event_id and referral_id attribution.
Update lead status, assignment, follow-up, lost reason.
Convert lead into job while preserving attribution.
List jobs by board/status/job_type/assigned user.
Read job detail respecting RLS scope.
Update job stage; may trigger notification and audit log.
Upload/tag job photos.
Claims dashboard with filters and missing docs.
Create claim-support record for job.
Update carrier, claim number, status, adjuster, amounts, compliance acknowledgement.
Add ACV, RCV, deductible, supplement, or final payment milestone.
Create supplement tracker entry.
List crews with role scope.
Assign crew/date/scope to job.
Submit safety checklist. Can gate job start.
Submit daily progress log; optional customer notification.
Request missing materials from field.
Approve/reject material request.
Return customer-safe portal view for one job.
Customer sends message to office.
Send approved template via SMS/email/portal after consent checks.
Read SMS consent/opt-out history.
Demo endpoint to create a simulated storm alert and ZIP impacts.
List storm events and severity.
Return ZIP impacts, past customers, open leads, and opportunity scores.
Create canvassing/customer check-in mission.
Assign route to canvasser.
Log door knock and optionally create a lead/appointment.
Referral dashboard and statuses.
Create referral from portal link, QR, or manual entry.
Approve referral reward after completion/payment checks.
Demo-only: change status and generate sample notification/audit record.

templates.body: Salazar Roofing & Remodeling: Your {appointment_type} is scheduled for {appointment_datetime}. Reply STOP to opt out.
Salazar Roofing & Remodeling: Your inspection is complete. We uploaded your inspection summary to your project portal: {portal_link}. Reply STOP to opt out.
Salazar Roofing & Remodeling: We received your insurance scope/document. Our team is reviewing the construction details and will update your portal with next steps.
Salazar Roofing & Remodeling: Your roof installation is scheduled for {install_date}. Materials are planned for {delivery_date}. Weather may affect timing.
Salazar Roofing & Remodeling: Our crew has arrived and started your project. Progress photos will be added to your portal.
Salazar Roofing & Remodeling: Today progress update: {progress_summary}. Your project is {progress_percent}% complete. View details: {portal_link}.
Salazar Roofing & Remodeling: Weather has delayed today work. We will update your schedule as soon as conditions allow. View updates: {portal_link}.
Salazar Roofing & Remodeling: Your warranty documents are now available in your portal. Thank you for trusting us with your home.
Salazar Roofing & Remodeling: We saw severe weather reported near your area. We hope your home is safe. Reply INSPECT if you want a no-pressure roof check. Reply STOP to opt out.
Salazar Roofing & Remodeling: Your referral status changed to {referral_status}. Track rewards here: {portal_link}.
Salazar Roofing & Remodeling: Thank you for choosing us. Share an honest review here: {review_link}. Your feedback helps local homeowners.

actions: assign default rep or queue owner
block job status move to in_progress

integrations.name: National Weather Service Alerts API
integrations.purpose: Storm alert ingest for service areas.
integrations.notes: Poll conservatively; use simulated alert endpoint for demo.

integrations.name: NOAA/NCEI Storm Events Database
integrations.notes: Not instant; better for historical records than same-day canvassing.

integrations.name: ZCTA boundary data
integrations.purpose: Approximate ZIP/ZCTA mapping from alert polygons.
integrations.notes: Label outputs as marketing ZIP/ZCTA areas, not guaranteed USPS ZIP impact.

integrations.name: Twilio or messaging provider
integrations.notes: A2P 10DLC registration and consent evidence required before production marketing SMS.

integrations.name: SendGrid/Postmark
integrations.purpose: Email notifications and portal link delivery.
integrations.notes: Use transactional domain auth before production.

integrations.name: QuickBooks Online
integrations.purpose: Invoices, payments, job costs, project profitability.
integrations.notes: MVP can export CSV or mock sync queue.

integrations.name: CompanyCam
integrations.notes: MVP should provide native photo upload/tagging.

integrations.name: EagleView / HOVER / Roofr reports
integrations.purpose: Measurement report storage and estimate inputs.
integrations.notes: Do not rebuild roof measurements in MVP.

integrations.name: Xactimate / ESX files
integrations.notes: MVP stores PDFs/files and estimate version metadata.

integrations.name: Supplier APIs (ABC/SRS/QXO)
integrations.notes: MVP material requests and PDF uploads are enough.

compliance_guardrails.rule: Use insurance-support documentation wording. Do not say the contractor files, negotiates, adjusts, or settles claims for homeowners.
Block language that waives, rebates, absorbs, discounts, or offsets insurance deductibles. Rewards must not reduce deductible obligations.
Support approved scripts, rep ID, do-not-knock list, no high-pressure language, and right-to-cancel form workflow when contracts are signed at a home.
Store transactional and marketing consent separately. Respect STOP/HELP and never send marketing SMS without documented consent.
Do not condition rewards on positive reviews. Use honest review language and disclose incentives where applicable.
Say affected marketing ZIP/ZCTA or elevated inspection opportunity. Do not claim a specific home is damaged without inspection.
Apply RLS/role-based access. Crew/canvassers should not see financial or insurance details they do not need.

customers_jobs.address: 2201 Elm Creek Dr, Royse City, TX 75189

recommended_stack.frontend: Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind/shadcn or equivalent component library
recommended_stack.backend: Next.js API routes or NestJS/Node API for demo
recommended_stack.storage: S3-compatible storage or local mock storage for demo files/photos
recommended_stack.maps: Mapbox or Google Maps for StormLoop route mock; can start with static map/pins
recommended_stack.messaging: Mock SMS/email provider in demo; provider adapter for Twilio/SendGrid later
recommended_stack.weather: Simulated storm endpoint first; NWS Alerts API worker adapter behind feature flag
recommended_stack.deployment: Vercel/Render/Fly.io for demo app; Supabase for database; seed script included

tickets: Implement auth role switcher for demo
Create database migrations for core entities
PDF/JSON handoff loaded into repo docs

demo_definition_of_done: User can complete the demo story from storm alert to lead, inspection, claim, crew update, portal view, and referral.
Role switcher proves crew/canvasser/customer cannot see restricted financial/claim data.
All KPI cards and dashboards use seeded data.
Status changes create activity log and mock notification records.
No production SMS, weather, accounting, or payment calls are required for demo; all external providers can be mocked.

non_goals_for_mvp: Do not rebuild Xactimate or claim-adjusting tools.
Do not process real insurance claims in demo.
Do not send production marketing SMS before A2P 10DLC approval and consent flows are complete.
Do not claim a specific home has storm damage without an inspection.
Do not build direct supplier ordering before material request workflow is proven.
Do not build native iOS/Android for demo unless responsive web/PWA fails field use case.

glossary.ACV: Actual Cash Value - initial claim value after depreciation in many property claims.
glossary.RCV: Replacement Cost Value - value used for replacement cost coverage, often involving recoverable depreciation after work completion.
glossary.Supplement: Additional documentation/estimate item used when the original scope misses code-required or damage-related work. In this app, tracked as contractor documentation, not claim negotiation.
glossary.ZCTA: ZIP Code Tabulation Area; approximate Census representation of ZIP areas, not official USPS delivery boundary.
glossary.StormLoop: Growth module for weather alerts, ZIP impacts, canvassing missions, lead capture, customer check-ins, and attribution.
